name: bjorn-dev-skills
description: Claude Code marketplace for Bjorn Melin's reusable development skill plugins.

plugins.name: native-motion
plugins.description: Self-contained native motion skills for Expo and React Native with bundled Reanimated, Expo, NativeWind, Lottie, Skia, Rive, R3F, and validation references.

plugins.name: web-motion
plugins.description: Self-contained web motion skills with TypeGPU, Motion React, CSS, WAAPI, Tailwind, Lottie, Three.js/R3F, and Rive references.
